name: portfolio-lambda
description: Consolidated AWS Lambda for chat and admin functionality

scripts.deploy:prep: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r deploy.zip index.js
scripts.deploy:build: npm run clean && npm install && npm run build && npm run deploy:package
scripts.deploy:package:
cd dist && zip -r deploy.zip index.js && cd .. && mkdir -p deploy && cp dist/deploy.zip deploy/lambda.zip && echo '
✅ Deployment packages created: lambda/dist/deploy.zip and lambda/deploy/lambda.zip'
